heroSubtext: Watch how autonomous AI agents transform customer engagement across industries, channels, and use cases.
ctaHeading: Ready to transform your customer experience?
ctaSubtext: See how GLUCOSE can help your enterprise deliver autonomous brand experiences that reach every customer, in every moment that matters.

featureSections.label: Overview
featureSections.heading: Meet GLUCOSE
featureSections.tagline: The complete autonomous brand engagement platform
featureSections.body: Discover GLUCOSE, our intuitive and reliable conversational Agentic-AI platform. See how it redefines customer engagement, enabling brands to autonomously enhance and personalize product experiences at scale.
featureSections.videoSrc: Videos/Meet GLUCOSE, our intuitive and reliable conversational Agentic-AI..mp4

featureSections.label: Multimodal AI
featureSections.heading: Visual Understanding
featureSections.tagline: Resolving customer issues faster with multimodal AI understanding
featureSections.body: GLUCOSE processes images and visual input to diagnose issues in real-time. Watch as it identifies a warning light on a vehicle dashboard and guides the user through resolution steps via WhatsApp.
featureSections.videoSrc: Videos/5.Y GLUCOSE Agentic-AI - Multimodal Use Case - Warning Light.mp4

featureSections.label: Sales Automation
featureSections.heading: Seamless Conversions
featureSections.tagline: Converting interest into booked test drives autonomously
featureSections.body: Transform interest into action. GLUCOSE contextually highlights key features based on customer preferences and seamlessly books test drive appointments, all within a natural conversation flow.
featureSections.videoSrc: Videos/5.Y GLUCOSE Agentic-AI - Sales Opportunity Signal - Test Drive Booking.mp4

featureSections.label: Voice AI
featureSections.heading: Natural Voice Understanding
featureSections.tagline: Turning negative experiences into brand loyalty moments
featureSections.body: Handle complex voice interactions with empathy. Watch GLUCOSE process voice messages from a frustrated customer, understand context and emotion, and deliver helpful, calming responses.
featureSections.videoSrc: Videos/5.Y GLUCOSE Agentic-AI - Voice Multimodal Use Case -  Frustrated Customer.mp4

featureSections.label: Customer Lifecycle
featureSections.heading: Ownership Support
featureSections.tagline: Reducing support cost while increasing service booking rates
featureSections.body: Support customers throughout their entire ownership journey. GLUCOSE autonomously diagnoses issues, provides guidance, and books service appointments directly via Telegram and other messaging platforms.
featureSections.videoSrc: Videos/5.Y GLUCOSE - Demo - Ownership & After Sales - Telegram.mp4

featureSections.label: The Pod
featureSections.heading: Deep Dive into GLUCOSE
featureSections.tagline: Insights from founders on agentic AI and customer engagement
featureSections.body: Join 5.Y's founders for an in-depth conversation about the future of customer engagement, the technology behind GLUCOSE, and how agentic AI is transforming enterprise customer experiences.
featureSections.videoSrc: Videos/The Pod  -  A Deep Dive Into 5.Y GLUCOSE Agentic AI.mp4
